---
title: "Evolutionary Game Theory and Collective Behavior"
subtitle: "Track C — Agent-Based Modeling"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Evolutionary Game Theory and Collective Behavior

**Track**: Track C — Agent-Based Modeling

The mathematical theory of strategic interaction, evolution of cooperation, and collective phenomena emergent from simple agent rules.

## Table of Contents

1. Classical Game Theory Foundations
2. Evolutionary Game Theory
3. Evolution of Cooperation
4. Opinion Dynamics and Social Influence
5. Flocking, Swarming, and Collective Motion
6. Self-Organization and Pattern Formation
7. Evolutionary Dynamics in Structured Populations
8. Applications: Ecology, Economics, and Social Systems

---

## Chapter 1: Classical Game Theory Foundations

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Evolutionary Game Theory

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Evolution of Cooperation

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Opinion Dynamics and Social Influence

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: Flocking, Swarming, and Collective Motion

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: Self-Organization and Pattern Formation

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Evolutionary Dynamics in Structured Populations

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Applications: Ecology, Economics, and Social Systems

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
